mapper.sql: id, dataset_code, dataset_name, dataset_desc, data_type, data_format, data_fields, data_volume, share_status, share_scope, target_organ_ids, resource_id, resource_name, usage_terms, user_id, user_name, organ_id, organ_name, start_date, end_date, remark, is_del, create_date, update_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shared_dataset ( dataset_code, dataset_name, dataset_desc, data_type, data_format, data_fields, data_volume, share_status, share_scope, target_organ_ids, resource_id, resource_name, usage_terms, user_id, user_name, organ_id, organ_name, start_date, end_date, remark, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{datasetCode}, #{datasetName}, #{datasetDesc}, #{dataType}, #{dataFormat}, #{dataFields}, #{dataVolume}, #{shareStatus}, #{shareScope}, #{targetOrganIds}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceName}, #{usageTerms}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{remark}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE shared_dataset
dataset_name = #{datasetName}, dataset_desc = #{datasetDesc}, data_type = #{dataType}, data_format = #{dataFormat}, data_fields = #{dataFields}, data_volume = #{dataVolume}, share_status = #{shareStatus}, share_scope = #{shareScope}, target_organ_ids = #{targetOrganIds}, resource_id = #{resourceId}, resource_name = #{resourceName}, usage_terms = #{usageTerms}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE shared_dataset SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE shared_dataset SET share_status = #{shareStatus}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM shared_dataset WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT FROM shared_dataset WHERE dataset_code = #{datasetCode} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
